overall.description: Cinematic game footage from a third-person perspective showing a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain pass during a nighttime snowstorm. The rider traverses a foggy, winding trail lined with snow-covered pine trees and frozen terrain, with visibility gradually decreasing as the journey progresses deeper into the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with frozen river

agents.ego_description: steadily riding a horse along the snow-covered valley trail at a consistent canter

entered.detail: wide trail covered in deep snow forming the main route through the valley
scattered snow-laden evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
cluster of pine trees with heavy snow accumulation on the right side
partially frozen waterway running parallel to the trail on the left
distant snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the fog ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain valley at night during a snowstorm. The rider moves along a snow-covered trail with a frozen river visible to the left and scattered pine trees lining both sides of the path, while distant mountain ridges loom through the fog ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail with snow banks

events.description: frozen river disappears from view as the path curves into denser terrain with rising snow banks

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride as the trail curves slightly right through increasingly dense pine forest

entered.detail: tall bank of accumulated snow rising along the left edge of the trail
large boulders blanketed in snow visible between the trees on the left
narrow gap between mountain peaks marking the trail's destination ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail curves through a more enclosed section of the mountain pass. Snow banks rise along the path edges, replacing the river view, while the trees on the right press closer to the trail. The terrain shifts to reveal snow-covered rocks and a defined mountain pass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass with heavy fog and dense forest

events.description: visibility decreases significantly as fog and snowfall intensify, obscuring distant terrain

agents.ego_description: riding deeper into the mountain pass with reduced visibility due to intensifying snow and fog

entered.detail: steep rock face covered in snow visible through the fog on the left side
thick wall of snow-laden pine trees pressing close to the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the rider entering a narrower, more enclosed mountain pass. Visibility drops significantly due to heavy fog and falling snow, with dense pine forests pressing close on the right and snow-covered cliffs visible through the mist on the left, creating an increasingly isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy mountain valley that gradually tightens into a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded pass. It begins on a wide trail at night during a snowstorm, moving past a frozen river and scattered pine trees while distant mountain ridges loom through the mist. As the path curves, the river disappears behind rising snow banks and the trees on the right press closer to the trail, shifting the terrain toward a more defined mountain pass marked by snow-covered rocks. The scene then narrows further as the rider enters a confined corridor where visibility drops significantly due to heavy falling snow. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly isolated, with dense pine forests crowding the right side and towering snow-covered cliffs emerging through the thick fog on the left.
